entities.name: Palazza nuovo / Biblioteca Civica Angelo Mai

details.description: A broad, historic square on a rainy, overcast day. In the center background stands a grand white-stone palace with a symmetrical Late-Renaissance/Neoclassical facade: a ground-floor arcaded loggia, two upper levels with pilasters and alternating triangular/segmental window pediments, and a balustraded roofline. The Italian flag hangs from the central balcony. Behind and above the roofline two stone towers are visible, one a tall civic bell tower. The square is paved with reddish brick laid in diagonal diamond patterns, glossy from the rain. In front of the palace sits the Contarini Fountain with its marble lions, presently accompanied by a decorated Christmas tree and seasonal lights. People with umbrellas cross the wet piazza; cafes with awnings line the left side and narrow residential buildings with balconies line the right.

details.description: Overcast day in Bergamo, Italy, featuring a prominent white stone civic building with an arcaded ground floor and a symmetrical upper façade. The structure has two square towers at the roofline and is set in a brick-paved square. A small Christmas tree and market stalls line the front, with a few people walking across the wet cobbles. Surrounding buildings in warm tones enclose the square, and subtle festive lights decorate the area. The Italian flag is visible on the central façade, suggesting an official civic building. The scene conveys the historic Piazza Vecchia area of Bergamo, likely in the Città Alta, with subdued winter light and reflective surfaces from recent rain.

details.description: Rainy, overcast view of Piazza Vecchia in Bergamo’s Città Alta. Centered is the white stone facade of the Palazzo Nuovo, with an arcaded ground floor, tall rectangular windows framed by classical pilasters and pediments, a central balcony bearing the Italian flag, and a balustraded roofline. Historic buildings with cafes flank the square, and a Christmas tree and seasonal decorations stand near the central entrance. The red-brick pavement of the square is wet and reflective, with a diamond pattern. A few pedestrians with umbrellas cross the piazza; slender historic towers rise behind the roofline.

details.description: A wide-angle, eye-level shot capturing the wet, rain-slicked expanse of Piazza Vecchia in Bergamo's Città Alta (Upper Town) under an overcast grey sky. The central focus is the imposing white marble facade of the Palazzo Nuovo, which features a neoclassical design with a ground-floor arcade (portico) of arches, a central balcony, and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. A small turret or lantern is visible on the roofline. In front of the Palazzo Nuovo, slightly to the right of the center, stands the Fontana Contarini, surrounded by statues. A Christmas tree is placed near the portico of the palace. The square is paved with dark stones arranged in a distinctive geometric diamond pattern, highly reflective due to the rain. To the left, darker historic buildings house cafes with awnings, while the right side features taller, ochre-colored residential or administrative buildings with balconies. Pedestrians with umbrellas and parked white vans are scattered throughout the scene.

details.description: The image shows Piazza Vecchia in Bergamo Alta, Italy, on a rainy, overcast day. The central focus is the Palazzo Nuovo, a grand white marble building in the Renaissance style, which houses the Biblioteca Civica Angelo Mai. The building features a ground-floor portico with nine arches and two small square towers on its roof. The square's pavement is made of dark bricks laid in a distinctive diagonal diamond pattern, reflecting the grey sky. To the left, the edge of the Palazzo della Ragione is visible. A few people are walking across the square, and a decorated Christmas tree stands near the center, indicating the winter season.

details.description: An overcast view of a historic Italian square paved with brick in diagonal patterns. Dominating the scene is a grand white stone palace with a symmetrical Renaissance-classical façade: multiple rows of rectangular windows with pediments, balustraded cornice lines, and a ground-floor arcade of large round arches. Holiday decorations and a Christmas tree are visible near the arcade. Rising behind the palace is a tall medieval stone bell tower with paired arched belfry openings and a parapet walkway at the top. Flanking the square are older buildings with balconies and shops.

details.description: A white neoclassical town-hall style building with a symmetry of arched arcades on the ground level and tall, narrow windows above. A prominent central tower or pavilion rises from the middle of the facade, featuring a square lantern-like top. The structure faces a wide, damp-looking cobblestone square with diagonal paving patterns. To the right, a row of shops or market stalls lines the square, and there are small Christmas lights and a decorated tree, suggesting a festive market setting. The sky is overcast, and a few pedestrians wander near the building. The overall scene is a European city square dominated by an ornate municipal building.

details.description: A wide, rain-slicked historic square with red-brick paving laid in diagonal patterns. At center distance stands a grand white Renaissance-style palazzo with a five-arch ground-floor loggia, pilasters and a balustraded roofline; an Italian flag hangs from a small central balcony. Holiday decorations and a Christmas tree are set up in front, with market stalls to the right. Behind the palazzo rise two older stone towers. People with umbrellas walk across the square beneath an overcast sky. Flanking the scene are rows of medieval and early-modern buildings with arcades and balconies.

details.description: A wide, wet cobblestone square in front of a large white building with a central tower. The façade features arched ground-floor openings and decorative stonework, suggesting Beaux-Arts or neoclassical influences. The plaza is bordered by more buildings and shows diagonal brick patterns on the ground. A few pedestrians stand near the entrance, and a Christmas-style display or shopfront lighting is visible along the right side, giving a festive atmosphere on a grey, overcast day.

details.description: The image, which is rotated 90 degrees clockwise, depicts a rainy scene in a historic European square. The primary subject is the Palazzo Nuovo, a prominent building with a white marble facade in the late Renaissance or Neoclassical style. The building features a rusticated ground floor with a portico of open arches and upper stories adorned with tall pilasters and pedimented windows. A small bell gable is visible on the roofline. The square, identified as Piazza Vecchia, features a distinctive pavement pattern of dark cobblestones intersected by diagonal bands of lighter stone. The ground is wet and reflective, indicating rain. To the sides, parts of other historic buildings with yellow and dark facades are visible. The sky is overcast and grey. In the foreground, the dark edge of an overhang or arch suggests the photographer may be standing under a portico.

details.description: A wide-angle shot of the Palazzo Nuovo in Bergamo, Italy, viewed across the wet, brick-paved Piazza Vecchia. The Palazzo Nuovo is a grand white building in the Renaissance style, featuring a ground-floor loggia with arches and two distinct towers at its rear. The square's pavement is laid in a complex herringbone pattern and reflects the overcast sky. People are seen walking across the square, and a Christmas tree is visible near the building's entrance. The photo appears to be taken from under the arches of the Palazzo della Ragione, looking north toward the library.
